column1:
Solicited Customer Feedback
Deliberate efforts are made to solicit feedback from customers and staff on the services and produ
- Questionnaires
- Customer interviews
- Customers forum
- Quest for Excellence Sessions (for staff)
- Voice of Customer Surveys
The various feedback efforts are coordinated by our Service and innovation Group
The feedback obtained from customers are reviewed and lessons learnt are used for staff training
